key_takeaway: With 400 waterfront cottages across Muskoka, Parry Sound, and Georgian Bay, Cottage Vacations is exactly the kind of operator that sees the biggest ROI from Boom — automated pricing, guest communication, and task management at scale.
summary_bullets: Managing 400 properties across multiple Ontario regions means your team is juggling pricing, guest comms, and ops across a massive footprint — Boom centralizes everything into one platform
Ontario's cottage market is seasonal and competitive — Boom's dynamic pricing engine adjusts rates in real-time based on demand, events, and competitor data to maximize your peak-season revenue
At your scale, even small efficiency gains compound fast — operators like you typically save 20+ hours per week on manual tasks after switching to Boom

discussion_points.title: Common Challenges at 400 Properties
items: Coordinating guest communication across hundreds of listings and multiple channels (Airbnb, VRBO, direct)
Pricing 400 cottages manually — seasonal demand, last-minute bookings, and competitor rates make this a full-time job
Cleaning and maintenance coordination across a geographically dispersed portfolio
Onboarding and training team members on multiple disconnected tools
Owner reporting and trust accounting at scale

discussion_points.title: How Boom Solves This
items: Unified inbox — every guest message from every channel in one timeline, with AI-powered auto-responses
Built-in dynamic pricing that adjusts rates across all 400 listings based on market demand
Automated task management — cleaning and maintenance tasks auto-assign based on check-in/check-out schedules
Single platform replacing multiple tools — one login, one dashboard, one source of truth
Real-time owner portal with revenue dashboards and automated financial reporting

discussion_points.title: Growth Opportunities
items: Direct booking channel — reduce OTA dependency and increase margins on your 400-property portfolio
AI-powered guest upsells — automatically offer early check-in, late checkout, and add-on experiences
Scale to 500+ properties without growing headcount — Boom's automation handles the operational load

demo_highlights.benefit: Your rates adjust automatically across all 400 cottages based on demand, seasonality, events, and competitor data. No more manual spreadsheet work.
Every guest message from Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com, and direct bookings — in one place. BAM handles routine queries automatically.
Cleaning and maintenance auto-assign based on check-in/check-out. Your field team just follows the app — no back-and-forth coordination.
Property owners see real-time revenue and occupancy data. Fewer calls, happier owners, easier trust accounting.
